calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Mark Poliner, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Mr. Chip Caughman.
Default entered against defendant on March 11, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on March 11, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant: Mr. Chip Caughman as follows:

Damages/Principal - $79,904.82.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,684.83.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $408.00, for a total of $84,997.65.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
